excerpt: Experienced professionals can leverage and apply sales experience from other industries in field-based positions in national accounts, government sales, contractor supplies and more. Our entry-level sales associate and inside sales positions are ideal for college grads who want to learn our business and grow into outside sales and branch management.
You'll learn all aspects of our sales processes, market strategy and branch operations, as well as explore territory coverage, persuasive selling, product knowledge and CRM tools.

Leverage marketing and sales tools to identify and sell new customers and recover dormant customers. Qualify and quantify existing customer needs using our CRM and persuasive selling. Coordinate with all branch departments to ensure customer satisfaction. Negotiate prices on equipment rentals and sales.

Determine if the inside sales opportunity can be turned into something more: Is this a transactional sale that can be handled by an employee at the counter, or should an outside salesperson respond? Typically, a person with sales experience is better able to develop and maintain a relationship with the customer.

Utilize your database: Most rental companies have a database that includes the name of your customer, his or her business and their purchasing history. Any notes you would like to add about past conversations or facts about their business also should be kept in this file.

Be proactive instead of waiting and assuming that they will return. Send direct mail pieces explaining all of the benefits to them should they continue to do business with your company. It is also effective to conduct a telephone campaign to reintroduce your business and capabilities/products.
Mobile Sales Team: Explore leads and engage with customers right from your mobile device. Quickly log activities and view nearby customers to make the most of your time in the field.

Get a complete view of critical interactions across the customer lifecycle including purchase history with a direct connection to your equipment. From lead management and quoting to order fulfilment and integrated workflows, our platform drives faster deals and greater operational alignment.
